memoria.title: Memoria
memoria.description: Memoria is a project that a friend and I are currently developing. It allows you to create a movie enhanced with AI from your pictures. I am working with Vue.js & Node.js, focusing on the interface and the connection with the APIs we are using to generate the movie.

artchive.title: Artchive
artchive.description: I created Artchive as a personal project to display some of the drawings & illustrations made by artists I love. The main challenge of this project was creating a dynamic grid that adapts to the displayed images.

cfdoc.title: cf.doc
cfdoc.description: cf.doc is my final school project. It's an AI tool that helps teams to understand the technical knowledge. I worked with Next.js on the landing page & created a tool that comapares the old & new documentation enhanced with AI.

pimpim.title: Pimpim's adventure
pimpim.description: In Pimpim's adventure, you play as PimPim, a penguin who must go through all four seasons to finally reach winter and his home. It was fully developed in C# during a one-week school project. This was our first time using Unity and coding in C#.

aurore.title: Aurore
aurore.description: Aurore is a low-code school project. It is a platform that allows you to rent house and apartments designed by architects and interior designers. The website was created with Bubble.

uso.title: USO
uso.description: USO is a tool that allows you to synchronize your Osu & Spotify accounts to enhance your playlists. I originally worked mainly as a front-end developer, but I also helped with the front-end towards the end. Initially, the project was made using React & Symfony but I finished the project years later using Vue.js for the front-end & Node.js for the back-end.
